category_sources: source_facts.description says patchutils is a collection of programs that operate on patch files.
source_facts.homepage is the official patchutils project page.
display_name_sources: source_facts.repo is the official twaugh/patchutils repository.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is a documentation surface.
Official project homepage is also supplied by source_facts.homepage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists diff and patch manipulation tools such as combinediff, filterdiff, interdiff, lsdiff, and splitdiff.
